## Validation

- [ ] `python validation/validate_repo.py`
- [ ] Repo-specific demo command passes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No real secrets, credentials, private URLs, auth headers, or production logs
- [ ] No live publishing, messaging, trading, or production mutation enabled by default
- [ ] Public examples use placeholders or fixtures only

## Public/private boundary

What private context, if any, was intentionally excluded?
